revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 7 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 7 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正暦]]元年<!--（[[990年]]_月_日）--> - 正暦に改元 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年<!--（[[1336年]]_月_日）--> - [[足利尊氏]]が[[建武式目]]を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年<!--（[[1634年]]_月_日）--> - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと決闘。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀 * [[嘉永]]6年<!--（[[1853年]]_月_日）--> - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[景行天皇]]60年<!--（[[130年]]_月_日）--> - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月6日 (旧暦)|11月6日]] 翌日[[11月8日 (旧暦)|11月8日]] - 前月[[10月7日 (旧暦)|10月7日]] 翌月[[12月7日 (旧暦)|12月7日]] *新暦[[11月7日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[11月26日]]） - 正暦に改元 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[建武式目]]を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1634年]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと決闘。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用

== 忌日 == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130年]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月7日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつなのか）は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[建武式目]]を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1634年]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用
== 誕生日 == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130年]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1628年]][[12月2日]]）） - [[御子神典膳]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月7日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつなのか）は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130年]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1628年]][[12月2日]]）） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

--> == Events == * [[正暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[是円]]・[[真恵]]兄弟らに諮問し『[[建武式目]]』を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1634年]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀（[[鍵屋の辻の決闘]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用 * 嘉永7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]]12月26日） - [[豊予海峡地震]]
== Births == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650年]]）
== Deaths == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130年]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1628年]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の7日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|正暦}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – 永祚から正暦に改元された. * {{ill|Kenmu (Japan)|ja|建武}}3年／{{ill|Engen|ja|延元}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}） – 足利尊氏は是円・真恵兄弟らに諮問し、『建武式目』を制定、これにより室町幕府が成立した.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}15年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 黒田孝高（如水または官兵衛）、武将（享年1604年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – 推古天皇（崇峻天皇）、第47代天皇.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の7日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|正暦}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – 永祚から正暦に改元された. * {{ill|Kenmu (Japan)|ja|建武}}3年／{{ill|Engen|ja|延元}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}） – 足利尊氏は是円・真恵兄弟らに諮問し、『建武式目』を制定、これにより室町幕府が成立した.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}15年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 黒田孝高（如水または官兵衛）、武将（享年1604年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – 推古天皇（崇峻天皇）、第47代天皇.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正暦]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[990]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[是円]]・[[真恵]]兄弟らに諮問し『[[建武式目]]』を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1634]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀（[[鍵屋の辻の決闘]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用 * 嘉永7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854]]12月26日） - [[豊予海峡地震]]
== Births == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650]]）
== Deaths == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1628]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[Category:New]] [[sn:ovember 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[Category:U]][[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[Category:U]][[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正暦]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[990]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[是円]]・[[真恵]]兄弟らに諮問し『[[建武式目]]』を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1634]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀（[[鍵屋の辻の決闘]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用 * 嘉永7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854]]12月26日） - [[豊予海峡地震]]
== Births == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650]]）
== Deaths == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1628]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

== Births == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650]]）

[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正暦]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[990]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[是円]]・[[真恵]]兄弟らに諮問し『[[建武式目]]』を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1634]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀（[[鍵屋の辻の決闘]]） * [[嘉永]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用 * 嘉永7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1854]]12月26日） - [[豊予海峡地震]]
== Births == * [[天正]]7th year（ユリウス暦[[1579]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650]]）
== Deaths == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1628]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役

== Deaths == * [[景行天皇]]60th year（ユリウス暦[[130]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1628]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役

[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|延元}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}}, and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}}. The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|室町幕府}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}}) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}}, with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}}) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}}) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}}, lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}}) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}}, the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]]). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}}) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}}, a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|延元}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}}, and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}}. The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|室町幕府}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}}) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}}, with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}}) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}}) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}}, lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}}) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}}, the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]]). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}}) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}}, a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[sn:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|延元}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|室町幕府}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|室町幕府}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|延元}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|室町幕府}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|延元}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡地震}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|日本武尊}}" to "|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family. == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).

[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武|12=draft}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=draft}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=draft}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=draft}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘|12=draft}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎|12=draft}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=draft}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明|12=draft}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎|12=draft|12=draft}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=draft|12=draft}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft|12=draft}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明|12=draft|12=draft}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=draft|12=draft}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=draft|12=draft}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎|12=draft|12=draft}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=draft|12=draft}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft|12=draft}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明|12=draft|12=draft}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] }} [[sn:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 7일]] [[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月初七]] [[en:draft:November 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:11月7日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ovember 7 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[990]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eizoku (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1336]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=draft|12=draft}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=draft|12=draft}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1634]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|duel|ja|決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|ja|鍵屋の辻の決闘|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|John Manjiro|ja|ジョン万次郎|12=draft|12=draft}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|December 26|ja|12月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=draft|12=draft}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1579]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|ja|毛利秀元|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (died [[1650]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[130]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft|12=draft}} (born [[1195]] ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1628]] {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ono Tadaaki|ja|小野忠明|12=draft|12=draft}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月7日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつなのか）は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[11月26日]]） - [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]より正暦に[[改元]] * [[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[12月10日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[是円]]・[[真恵]]兄弟らに諮問し『[[建武式目]]』を制定。[[室町幕府]]が成立 * [[寛永]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1634年]][[12月26日]]） - 伊賀越仇討。渡辺数馬が河合又五郎らと[[決闘]]。[[荒木又右衛門]]が助太刀（[[鍵屋の辻の決闘]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月7日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が中浜万次郎（[[ジョン万次郎]]）を普請役格に登用 * 嘉永7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]]12月26日） - [[豊予海峡地震]]
== 誕生日 == * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[11月25日]]） - [[毛利秀元]]、[[長府藩]]主（+ [[1650年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[景行天皇]]60年（ユリウス暦[[130年]][[12月24日]]） - [[景行天皇]]、12代[[天皇]]・[[日本武尊]]の父 * [[寛永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1628年]][[12月2日]]） - [[小野忠明]]、剣術家、将軍家指南役
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|qq=|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|qq=|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|qq=|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|qq=|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|qq=|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|qq=|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|qq=|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|qq=|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|qq=|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
