Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – An era change was made from [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eizoku (Japan)]] to [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a [[:en:Duel|duel]] , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the [[:en:Igagoe vendetta|Kagiya no Tsuji Duel]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ([[:en:Nakahama Manjirō|John Manjiro]] ) to a construction role. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 26|December 26]] ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ) – [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] , lord of the [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] (died [[:en:1650|1650]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 60th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:130|130]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] , the 12th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1628|1628]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]] ) – [[:en:Mikogami Tenzen|Ono Tadaaki]] , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初七]][[zh:十一月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840377]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|990|en|990|WD=Q23730|lt=990}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eiso (era)|en|Eiso (era)|WD=Q1327358|lt=Eizoku (Japan)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|WD=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|Duel|en|Duel|WD=Q191503|lt=duel}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Igagoe vendetta|en|Igagoe vendetta|WD=Q10564180|lt=Kagiya no Tsuji Duel}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|Nakahama Manjirō|en|Nakahama Manjirō|WD=Q1193167|lt=John Manjiro}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|en|Mōri Hidemoto|WD=Q1133105|lt=Mōri Hidemoto}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|en|Chōfu Domain|WD=Q903430|lt=Chōfu Domain}} (died {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|130|en|130|WD=Q396661|lt=130}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1628|en|1628|WD=Q6840|lt=1628}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}} ) – {{ill|Mikogami Tenzen|en|Mikogami Tenzen|WD=Q6850068|lt=Ono Tadaaki}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

{{Not to be confused with|November 7|qq=November 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|990|en|990|WD=Q23730|lt=990}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eiso (era)|en|Eiso (era)|WD=Q1327358|lt=Eizoku (Japan)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|WD=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|Duel|en|Duel|WD=Q191503|lt=duel}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Igagoe vendetta|en|Igagoe vendetta|WD=Q10564180|lt=Kagiya no Tsuji Duel}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|Nakahama Manjirō|en|Nakahama Manjirō|WD=Q1193167|lt=John Manjiro}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|en|Mōri Hidemoto|WD=Q1133105|lt=Mōri Hidemoto}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|en|Chōfu Domain|WD=Q903430|lt=Chōfu Domain}} (died {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|130|en|130|WD=Q396661|lt=130}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1628|en|1628|WD=Q6840|lt=1628}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}} ) – {{ill|Mikogami Tenzen|en|Mikogami Tenzen|WD=Q6850068|lt=Ono Tadaaki}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|990|en|990|WD=Q23730|lt=990}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ) – An era change was made from {{ill|Eiso (era)|en|Eiso (era)|WD=Q1327358|lt=Eizoku (Japan)}} to {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} via {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|WD=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year / {{ill|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} consulted with the brothers {{ill|Zeien|ja|是円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zeien|1=Zeien|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84977487}} and {{ill|Masae|ja|真恵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masae|1=Masae|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85271929}} , and established the {{ill|Kenmu Shikimoku|ja|建武式目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu Shikimoku|1=Kenmu Shikimoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4226141}} . The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|Duel|en|Duel|WD=Q191503|lt=duel}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Igagoe vendetta|en|Igagoe vendetta|WD=Q10564180|lt=Kagiya no Tsuji Duel}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|Nakahama Manjirō|en|Nakahama Manjirō|WD=Q1193167|lt=John Manjiro}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Hidemoto|en|Mōri Hidemoto|WD=Q1133105|lt=Mōri Hidemoto}} , lord of the {{ill|Chōfu Domain|en|Chōfu Domain|WD=Q903430|lt=Chōfu Domain}} (died {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} 60th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|130|en|130|WD=Q396661|lt=130}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} , the 12th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} and father of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} (born {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1628|en|1628|WD=Q6840|lt=1628}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}} ) – {{ill|Mikogami Tenzen|en|Mikogami Tenzen|WD=Q6850068|lt=Ono Tadaaki}} , a swordsman and instructor to the shogunal family.

The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1154406}} was founded. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634|1=1634}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26|1=December 26}} ) – An Iga vendetta incident occurred: Watanabe Kazuma dueled with Kawai Matagorō and others in a {{ill|Duel|en|Duel|WD=Q191503|lt=duel|1=Duel}} , with Araki Mataueimon assisting (in what became known as the {{ill|Igagoe vendetta|en|Igagoe vendetta|WD=Q10564180|lt=Kagiya no Tsuji Duel|1=Igagoe vendetta}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7|1=December 7}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appointed Nakahama Manjirō ({{ill|Nakahama Manjirō|en|Nakahama Manjirō|WD=Q1193167|lt=John Manjiro|1=Nakahama Manjirō}} ) to a construction role. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|WD=Q2761|lt=December 26|1=December 26}} ) – The {{ill|Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja|豊予海峡Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyoyo Strait Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred.
